content: Neighborhood Watch: Another late night in Goodneighbor, eh KL-E-0? How's business been at Kill or Be Killed lately? KL-E-0: Business is booming, as always. Everyone needs their weapons and ammo, especially in these dangerous times. But enough about work, I've been meaning to ask - how do you manage to stay so fit and attractive with everything going on around us?

Neighborhood Watch: Well, I try to stay active and keep up with my training. It helps me stay sharp and ready for anything. Plus, I've found that taking care of myself physically also helps me stay focused and level-headed in tense situations. KL-E-0: That makes sense. I suppose being prepared for anything is crucial in our line of work. Speaking of which, I should probably get back to my shop and make sure everything's in order. But it was nice chatting with you, Neighborhood Watch. Let's catch up again soon.
